description: UNIVERSAL CARRY SURFACE — institutional cross-asset carry engine. Answers: 'which asset is the market paying me most to hold, right now?' across equity / FX / FI / commodity / crypto. Z-scored within class, ranked cross-asset, with carry-momentum vs 7D/30D snapshots and risk-adjusted (Sharpe-of-carry) leaders.

schedule.description: Carry surface refresh every 4 hours — cross-asset carry ranks + momentum
